common.title: 🌍 Kilometer Knobelei
common.subtitle: Guess the distance between two cities!

question.title: ❓ Current Question
question.sortCities: Order the cities from nearest to farthest:
question.hint: Shortcut: press G to jump here, Enter to submit.
question.distanceTemplate: How far is it from {city1} to {city2}? (in km)

answer.title: 📍 Your Answer
answer.shortcut: Shortcut: press G to jump here, Enter to submit.

playerSetup.title: 👤 Player Setup
playerSetup.nameHint: Shortcut: press N to focus your name field.

lobbyControls.gameIdHint: Shortcut: press J to focus the game code field.

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.autoAdvanceAllAnsweredLabel: Start next question immediately when all players answered
settings.wrongAnswerPointsOthersLabel: Wrong answers give every other player +1 point

lobbyGuide.title: 📘 How To Play
lobbyGuide.intro: Everything you need before the start:
lobbyGuide.rule1: Each round: estimate the distance between two cities.
lobbyGuide.rule2: Default: the closest guess earns 1 point.
lobbyGuide.rule3: The host can enable special rules (e.g. first answer ends the round).
lobbyGuide.rule4: After all rounds, the player with the most points wins.
lobbyGuide.ui1: Set your name, then create a game or join with code + PIN.
lobbyGuide.ui2: Host: review/adjust settings and lock them if needed.
lobbyGuide.ui3: All players click Ready, then the round starts.
lobbyGuide.ui4: Enter your guess and confirm with Submit Answer.
lobbyGuide.ui5: Shortcuts: N name field, J join code, G guess input.

messages.title: 💬 Game Chat
messages.settingsSummary: Max Rounds: {maxRounds}, Countdown: {countdownSeconds}s, Answer Time: {answerSeconds}s, Pause: {pauseSeconds}s
messages.backToLobbyReady: Back to lobby. Ready to create or join a new game!
messages.canUpdateAnswer: 📝 You can now update your answer
messages.answerLockedWaiting: ✅ Answer locked in! Waiting for other players...
messages.invalidSettingsInput: Please enter valid values for all settings.

serverErrors.kickBeforeCountdown: Players can only be kicked before countdown.
serverErrors.playerNotFoundInGame: Player was not found in this game.
serverErrors.onlyHostLockSettings: Only the host can lock settings.
serverErrors.onlyHostUpdateSettings: Only the host can update settings.
serverErrors.settingsOnlyBeforeCountdown: Settings can only be changed before countdown.
serverErrors.onlyHostStartWarmup: Only the host can start warmup.
serverErrors.warmupOnlyBeforeCountdown: Warmup is only available before countdown.
serverErrors.removedByHost: You were removed by the host.

gameEnd.title: Game Finished!
gameEnd.accuracy_formula: The formula is: Accuracy = 100 - (|Guess - Actual| / Actual) * 100
